Tour Packages

Our 5 Packages

Every tour departs from Marasy Marina, Al Bateen. All boats privately chartered — your group, your pace. Book and get a bonus free hour on selected packages.

AED 1,499
🏝️
Most Popular · 5–7 Pax
Island Adventure Package
The ultimate Gulf day out — island fishing, a swim in crystal waters, BBQ on the beach, and a scenic Abu Dhabi City Tour by boat. Book 5 hours, get 1 extra hour free.
🎣 Fishing 🏊 Island Swimming 🍖 BBQ 🏙️ City Tour ⏱ 5+1 Hrs Free
AED 399
⚓
Quick Transfer
Boat Pick-Up & Drop
Need to get somewhere by water? Our boat collects you from your location and drops you at the marina or destination — fast, scenic, and stress-free.
🚤 Boat Transfer 📍 Any Location ⚡ On Demand
AED 799
🧭
Dedicated Charter · 4+1 Hrs Free
Pick-Up & Drop with Captain
A dedicated boat and captain at your service for 4 hours — fully flexible, go wherever you like on the Gulf. Book 4 hours, the 5th is on us.
👨‍✈️ Dedicated Captain ⏱ 4+1 Hrs Free 🗺️ Your Route
AED 999
🍌
Family Fun · 5–7 Pax · 4+1 Hrs Free
Island Activities Package
Boat pick-up, then a full island activity day — Banana Boat, Donut ride, Kayaking, and a beachside BBQ. Book 4 hours, get 1 extra hour absolutely free.
🍌 Banana Boat 🍩 Donut Ride 🚣 Kayak 🍖 BBQ ⏱ 4+1 Hrs Free
AED 399
🏊
Quick Dip · 1+1 Hrs Free
Swimming Tour
A refreshing swim in the clear Gulf waters with complimentary water and fresh juice on board. Book 1 hour and get an extra hour absolutely free.
🌊 Gulf Waters 💧 Water & Juice ⏱ 1+1 Hrs Free
What's Included

Activities & Experiences

Every package is built around these Gulf adventures — here's a closer look at what awaits you.

🍩
Donut Ride
Hold on tight as you spin and bounce across the Gulf waves on an inflatable donut — pure adrenaline for all ages.
🚣
Kayaking
Paddle through calm island waters at your own pace — a peaceful, scenic way to explore Abu Dhabi's coastline.
⚓
Boat Pick-Up & Drop
We collect you by boat from your location and deliver you to the marina or any coastal destination — scenic and stress-free.
🍌
Island Trip with Banana Boat Ride
Thrilling family fun — ride the waves on a banana boat before setting foot on a private island.
🍖
BBQ on the Island
Grill fresh catch or chef-prepared meats on a private island beach — the ultimate Gulf dining experience.
🏊
Afternoon Island Swimming
Relax and swim on pristine, uncrowded beaches accessible only by boat.
Dining Destinations

Places We Cover

Arrive by boat at Abu Dhabi's most iconic dining venues — breakfast, brunch or dinner on the water's edge.

🍽️ All dining venues offer Breakfast, Brunch & Dinner options unless noted
